ideation: This animation sequence depicts two robots holding hands, emphasizing connection and friendship.  The movement should be smooth and gentle, suggesting a natural and comfortable interaction. I'll use a 4-frame sequence to highlight the key moments of the gesture. The robot's lack of elbows will be compensated by careful wrist positioning and joint movements to create the illusion of a natural hand clasp. Frame 1 will show both robots with arms slightly extended outward, palms facing each other in preparation to clasp hands.  Frame 2 shows the hands meeting and beginning to grasp each other. Frame 3 depicts the full hand clasp, with arms adjusted slightly to create a comfortable and stable hold. Finally, Frame 4 will have the robots holding hands, but with a slight adjustment to their posture to add a touch of natural variation.

frames.beat: arms extend slightly, palms ready to meet
hands reach out and begin to clasp
fingers interlock, a firm and gentle hold
robots hold hands, a warm connection
